title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BULUAN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BULUAN, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, TO DATU LUMINOG MANGELEN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4118 / 59 OG No. 51, 8743 (December 23, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3770, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BULUAN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BULUAN, PROVINCE OF COTABATO, TO DATU LUMINOG MANGELEN CENTRAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Buluan Central Elementary School in the Municipality of Buluan, Province of Cotabato, is hereby changed to Datu Luminog Mangelen Central Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1968.
